task_description: Wave 0/1 Foundation: Wire QuantSync and QuantAds with all missing Next.js API routes and AppShell integration. These are the two most broken apps (0 API routes each, all frontend fetches 404). This unblocks the data flow for both apps and establishes the proxy pattern for all other apps to follow.

verification.summary: Both QuantSync and QuantAds pass typecheck, tests (93+102=195 tests), and build successfully. Also fixed 30 shared-ui files missing 'use client' directives that were causing pre-existing build failures.
